segments.text: The human brain is an incredibly
plex organ that is central to our
vous system. It is responsible for
ctions such as thinking and memory. Its
position is mainly of neurons, which
ys a crucial role in learning and adaptability.

academic.passage: The study of the human brain reveals its complexity and essential functions. Comprised of billions of neurons, the brain processes information from the environment, coordinates movement, and facilitates cognitive abilities like memory and problem-solving. Understanding its structure and function is crucial for advancements in medicine and psychology, as it holds the key to treating neurological disorders and enhancing learning methods. Research continues to uncover the intricacies of brain connectivity, which is vital for cognitive development and rehabilitation.

questions.q: What is the main focus of the passage?
options: The complexity of the human brain
The role of memory in learning
questions.explain: 這篇文章的主要焦點在於人類大腦的複雜性及其重要功能。

questions.q: What is primarily composed of billions of neurons?
questions.explain: 人類大腦主要由數十億個神經元組成。

questions.q: What can be inferred about brain connectivity?
options: It is unimportant for cognitive development
questions.explain: 大腦的連結性對於學習至關重要，這在文章中有提到。

questions.q: What does the word 'facilitates' most closely mean in this context?
questions.explain: 在這個語境中，'facilitates' 的意思是增強或使容易。

daily.passage: Attention students! The library will be closed this Friday for maintenance. Please make sure to borrow any necessary books before then. We apologize for any inconvenience and appreciate your understanding.

questions.q: Why will the library be closed?
questions.explain: 圖書館將於本週五因維護而關閉。

questions.q: What should students do before Friday?
questions.explain: 學生應在週五之前借用必要的書籍。
